title: Orphaned-accession reconciliation tooling
context: Tooling to reconcile orphaned accessions reduces dead links below 2% and keeps molecular references resolvable (backlog; PLAN O7). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Build tooling that detects and reconciles orphaned/dead accessions, proposing fixes without silently mutating curated values.
acceptanceCriteria: Detects orphaned/dead accessions and links across the catalog; reports candidates for reconciliation.
Proposed reconciliations are logged and reviewable; no silent overwrites; target dead-link rate <2%.
Integrated with the dead-link CI check; reviewed by maintainer.
output: A merged PR adding orphaned-accession reconciliation tooling with a reconciliation report.
